name: Wisconsin Potato Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt butter over medium-high heat.
2. Saute celery and onion until tender.
3. Add potatoes and broth. Cover and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 12 minutes.
4. In batches, puree the potato mixture in a blender or food processor.
5. Return to saucepan. Stir in milk and seasonings.
6. Add cheese and heat only until melted.
7. Top with croutons and garnish with parsley if desired.
